properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My cup is full my heart is overflowing I've been blessed in ways my mind can't comprehend And when I think your hand of love Has given me enough You reach down and touch me once again With so much

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: More than I could ever ask you for More than I dream you had in store for me its hard to see Oh Lord how you could possibly give more More than my hearts desires Much more than love requires of You for all you do I worship and adore you even more

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If all that you have given me was mercy A chance to live when I deserved to die Lord that would have been enough But out of your great love You poured out your grace in limitless supply And gave me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: As long as there is breath in me And life left to live I will forever be amazed at how You give and give and give so much
